bead.title: docs(spec): FEAT-008 AC for graph edge contrast (WCAG AA non-text)
bead.description: Add an acceptance criterion to docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-008-web-ui.md stating that doc graph edges and arrowheads must meet WCAG AA non-text contrast (>=3:1 against canvas) in both light and dark themes. Single-file spec edit. See /tmp/story-1-final.md (bead-C).
bead.acceptance:
AC1: docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-008-web-ui.md contains a new AC entry referencing WCAG AA 3:1 non-text contrast for doc graph edges and arrowheads in both themes.
AC2: No other files modified.
